body.title: D335 Phase 1: Standalone utility closet server
body.result: D335 Phase 1 complete: standalone utility closet server with agent registration. 1800-line Starlette/uvicorn service. 20 passing tests. Launchers (superclaude + superclaude.ps1) start utility closet + forward args to Claude Code. Ready for Phase 2 (Igor as client).
body.description: Extract web server from Igor into standalone utility_closet_server.py. Starlette/uvicorn, agent-agnostic. Dashboard API, /api/cc_send, channel, system health, static UI serving. /health endpoint + PID file + stale detection. Logging to ~/.TheIgors/logs/utility_closet.log.
